Label: Interleukin-6
Definition: Pro-inflammatory cytokine. Plasma IL-6 >400 pg/mL classifies hyperinflammatory ARDS subphenotype. Target of tocilizumab/sarilumab.
Reclassify_Reason: Geographic location — not an ontology concept

Label: Interleukin-8
Definition: Neutrophil chemoattractant (CXCL8). Elevated in ARDS BAL and plasma; drives neutrophilic alveolitis. Elevated in hyperinflammatory subphenotype.
Reclassify_Reason: Geographic location — not an ontology concept
